title: Numerical Error, Roots, Interpolation, and Quadrature
description: Build, test, and communicate a model involving precision-sensitive scientific computation. Learners cumulatively produce a reproducible numerical foundations computational study through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Formulate conditioning stability in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Derive root finding in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Compute interpolation splines in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
